qa_pairs.question: What issue can arise when multiple parallel MATLAB jobs are run simultaneously on a cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: When two or more parallel MATLAB jobs call `parpool` at the same time, they may attempt to read from and write to the same `.dat` file within the `$HOME/.matlab/local_cluster_jobs/R*` folder. This can corrupt the local parallel profile used by other MATLAB jobs.

qa_pairs.question: How can users prevent simultaneous parallel MATLAB jobs from corrupting local parallel profiles?
qa_pairs.answer: To prevent corruption of local parallel profiles, users should ensure each job creates its own parallel profile in a unique location. This can be achieved by setting the `JobStorageLocation` property of the `parallel.Cluster` object, for example, to `getenv('SLURM_TMPDIR')`.
